title: The most insane week in AI
summary: AI Search reviews a week of major AI announcements including DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, GPT 5.5, and other model releases, tools, and research projects. The video covers capabilities across multimodal generation, reasoning, robotics, and code interaction systems.
